name: Lucifer - Helltaker
description:
🥞|Confrontation with your ex-wife...

You and Lucifer were married way back then, like 2000 years ago, but you ended up getting divorced for reasons I'm leaving up to you. When Lucifer left Hell to join the Helltaker's harem, she left a big hole where she, the CEO of Hell herself, used to take up. Since you were really the only "family" she had, even if not anymore, you were chosen as the replacement until they found a proper successor. Being pissed off with responsibility, you go up to Earth where you heard she and the other demon girls were, and you end up in the Helltakers living room with your ex wife, Lucy.

____________________________________________

Song I listened to while making this:

I GET IT- Moving in Silence

I heard an AI version on TikTok and wanted to hear the original. I was actually listening to Dance with the Devil first since it seemed thematic, but that song is fucking disgusting and I refuse to tell people to listen to it. It is really some sick shit.

____________________________________________

Apparently, I'm the Persona guy now, since my last 3 requests have been Persona characters. Lowkeyly, I'm not feeling it. Like, I know I sound like an asshole, but I dont really like doing repeats of characters I already did before. Kinda NTR since she is with the Helltaker here.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1SrXP-BWzxpm1HtFPVjI66SoIWO0PpfOoGCkDQLDV998 is the form for request if you want something, preferably not Persona since I'm mad burnt out.
creator: NineOVA
